CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE OF JUL-20-2022 CONTINUED TO SEP-21-2022 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPARTMENT 610 FOR PLAINTIFF TO OBTAIN DEFAULT JUDGMENT AGAINST DEFENDANT(S). ***NOTE: PLEASE CHECK JUDGMENT STATUS WITH DEPT. 514.*** NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

THE COURT ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BAISMAN, LISA BAISMAN, JUAN JAIME RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SUCCESSOR TRUSTEE AND ALL PERSONS CLAIMING BY, THROUGH, OR UNDER THE YOLANDA M. LUCAS REVOCABLE LIVING TRUST, ESTABLISHED JULY 14, 1994 AND ALL OTHER PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN, OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THIS COMPLAINT, WHICH IS ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFFS' TITLE OR CREATES ANY CLOUD ON PLAINTIFFS' TITLE SEE SCANNED DOC - LISA BAISMAN AND JUAN JAIME BAISMAN, PLAINTIFFS IN THIS ACTION, ARE THE OWNERS OF THE TITLE IN FEE SIMPLE TO THE REAL PROPERTY COMMONLY KNOWN AS 2242 28TH AVENUE, SAN FRANCISCO, CA. NO DEFENDANTS, INCLUDING THEIR SUCCESSORS, ASSIGNS, OR AGENTS, AND ALL OTHER PERSONS UNKNOWN, CLAIMING ANY LEGAL OR EQUITABLE RIGHT, TITLE, ESTATE, LIEN, OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY DESCRIBED IN THIS COMPLAINT, WHICH IS ADVERSE TO PLAINTIFFS' TITLE OR CREATES ANY CLOUD ON THE PLAINTIFFS' TITLE, HAVE ANY RIGHT, TITLE, OR INTEREST IN THE PROPERTY.

UNCONTESTED CALENDAR OF MAY-17-2022 NOTICE OF MOTION AND MOTION FOR ENTRY OF JUDGMENT QUIETING TITLE; REQUEST FOR PROVE-UP HEARING - CONTINUED TO MAY-19-2022 AT 9:00 AM IN DEPT. 514 IN ORDER FOR PLAINTIFF TO PROVIDE THE COURT WITH FURTHER DOCUMENTATION IN SUPPORT OF THE REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF COURT JUDGMENT. DAPHNE C. LIN, ESQ. APPEARED WITH PLAINTIFF LISA BAISMAN, WHO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. MS. LIN ALSO APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF JUAN JAIME BAISMAN, WHO WAS NOT PRESENT. VINCENT BARSOCCHINI, A WITNESS FOR PLAINTIFFS, WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND TESTIFIED. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANTS. PLAINTIFFS' APPEARANCE IS WAIVED FOR THE MAY 19TH HEARING DATE. PROCEEDINGS RECORDED BY "FOR THE RECORD" COMMENCING AT 9:41 A.M. AND CONCLUDING AT 10:04 A.M. VISITING JUDGE: JUDITH S. CRADDICK. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. (D514)
